module.name: rating
module.description: Star rating (filled / half / empty stars) for a score out of max. Inline, so it sits in a line or a table cell.
module.aiSpec:
An inline STAR RATING — show a score as filled/half/empty stars, e.g. in a comparison, review or scorecard (works inside table cells). No body; params only. Parameters: `value` (number, default 0) — the score out of `max`; halves are supported, e.g. 3.5. `max` (integer 1-10, default 5) — number of stars. `color` (color, default #f5a623) — fill color of the stars. `emptycolor` (color, default auto) — color of the empty portion; blank = a faded tint of `color`. `symbol` (select star|heart|circle|square|diamond, default star) — the glyph to repeat. `size` (number px, default inherit) — glyph size; blank = inherit the text size. `gap` (number px 0-20, default 1) — spacing between glyphs. `showValue` (boolean, default false) — append the numeric "value/max" readout.
Example: <!-- @rating value: 4.5, symbol: heart, showValue: true -->.

param.name: value
param.label: Score
param.desc: Score out of max; halves allowed, e.g. 3.5.

param.name: emptycolor
param.label: Empty color
param.desc: Color of the empty portion; blank = a faded tint of the star color.

param.name: size
param.label: Size (px)
param.desc: Glyph size; blank = inherit the surrounding text size.

snippet.label: Star rating
snippet.description: Inline star rating out of max; value may be fractional (e.g. 3.5).
